message:
chore: Google connector improvements, arXiv parser fix, dependency
additions, test vector updates, and metadata sync

Assorted improvements across connectors and infrastructure:

connectors/google-calendar:
- Cargo.toml: add fcp-google-discovery dependency
- client.rs: make google_auth_is_secretless() const
- connector.rs: extract self_check_report_from_result() helper for
  cleaner self-check response construction
- tests/integration.rs: migrate 7 test macros from
  fcp_async_core::runtime::test to tokio::test(flavor = "current_thread")
  for better ecosystem compatibility

connectors/arxiv/src/xml_parser.rs:
- Fix whitespace normalization: replace naive trim().replace('\n', " ")
  with split_whitespace().collect().join(" ") for proper collapsing of
  multiple consecutive spaces and newlines in title/summary fields

connectors/bigquery/Cargo.toml:
- Add fcp-google-discovery dependency for schema introspection

connectors/google-ai/Cargo.toml:
- Add fcp-google-discovery dependency for schema introspection

crates/fcp-core/tests/vectors:
- Update enrollment/request_vectors.cbor and
  simulate/simulate_request_vectors.cbor binary test vectors to
  reflect recent schema changes

Cargo.lock:
- Updated lockfile reflecting Hyper/tokio transitive deps from
  fcp-host migration and new connector dependencies

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Sync issue tracker statuses for completed work items

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -300,6 +300,12 @@ name = "asupersync-tokio-compat"

  "futures-util",

  "thiserror 2.0.18",
+ "tokio",

  "tracing-subscriber",
  "uuid",

 name = "fcp-host"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
+ "asupersync",
  "asupersync-tokio-compat",
  "async-trait",
  "axum",
@@ -2637,12 +2646,16 @@ dependencies = [
  "fcp-e2e",
  "fcp-sandbox",
  "fcp-testkit",
+ "futures-util",
+ "hyper",
+ "hyper-util",
  "reqwest 0.13.2",
  "semver",
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
  "tempfile",
  "thiserror 2.0.18",
+ "tower",
  "tracing",
  "tracing-subscriber",
 ]
